penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 225% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 250% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Overtime — first band
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 150% of the base rate (Overtime — first band).

penalties.title: Overtime — after first band
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 200% of the base rate (Overtime — after first band).

penalties.title: Overtime — Sunday
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 200% of the base rate (Overtime — Sunday).
